CREATE TABLE db_name.time_series_table (id UInt32, timestamp DateTime, value Float64) ENGINE=TimeSeries METRICS metrics_table;
CREATE TABLE db_name.metrics_table (metric_id UInt32, metric_value Float64) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY metric_id;
CREATE TABLE db_name.time_series_table_inner ENGINE=TimeSeries METRICS INNER UUID '01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef';
CREATE TABLE db_name.other_table (id UInt32, timestamp DateTime) ENGINE=MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
SELECT ts.id, ts.value FROM db_name.time_series_table AS ts JOIN db_name.other_table AS ot ON ts.timestamp = ot.timestamp;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, timestamp FROM db_name.time_series_table WHERE value > 50) AS filtered_ts;
SELECT a.id, t.value FROM (SELECT id FROM db_name.time_series_table) AS a LEFT JOIN timeSeriesMetrics(db_name.time_series_table) AS t ON a.id = t.metric_id;
SELECT * FROM timeSeriesMetrics(db_name.time_series_table) WHERE metric_id IN (SELECT metric_id FROM db_name.metrics_table WHERE metric_value > 15);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.metric_value FROM db_name.time_series_table AS t1 JOIN db_name.metrics_table AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.metric_id WHERE t1.value > 150;
